summary:
CORRUPTION EXPOSURE AND THREATS: Brandon states that Pam Bondi possesses evidence to expose layered, dark corruption, which has resulted in a $50,000 bounty on her life. He claims a hit list exists targeting figures such as Alex Jones, Tucker Carlson, Rudy Giuliani, and various judges, with the operation funded by foreign cryptocurrency. Brandon explicitly mentions the existence of blackmail tapes involving high-profile individuals and young people, describing an underground network utilizing SIM cards for communication.

SPORTS INDUSTRY REVELATIONS AND REVIVAL: Brandon describes upcoming events in major sports leagues, including the NBA, NFL, and Major League Baseball. He states that LeBron James will experience a humbling dethronement. Following the exposure of deep corruption within these organizations, Brandon claims a massive spiritual revival will occur during sporting events, where athletes and young people will become radically devoted to Jesus.

WEATHER MANIPULATION AND AUTHORITY: Brandon asserts that weather is being weaponized through methods like HAARP and chemical induction, predicting extreme events such as ice storms, blizzards in Buffalo, and massive power outages. He explicitly claims that believers have the authority to control the weather, citing instances of commanding rain in Tulsa and praying against drought in Australia. He also describes a Category 5 hurricane hitting Jamaica, linking it to the alleged legalization of witchcraft and commanding the storm to dissipate.

CIVIL UNREST AND ECONOMIC COLLAPSE: Brandon recounts a vision from April 2024 depicting the cessation of government welfare programs, leading to massive riots, looting, and martial law in cities like Philadelphia, Chicago, and New York. He describes an impending complete financial meltdown where people flee to rural areas like Oklahoma and Kansas to survive by growing their own food. He states that Donald Trump is attempting to delay a globalist digital beast system and prevent the American economy from collapsing.

FUTURE OF THE CHURCH AND GATHERINGS: Brandon claims that megachurches will face foreclosure and close due to a lack of financial giving. In their place, he envisions rural revivals and Holy Ghost Woodstocks taking place in fields, utilizing flatbed trucks as stages. He describes massive gatherings of young people wearing white t-shirts worshipping in large auditoriums and stadiums.

PRAYERS FOR POLITICAL FIGURES: Brandon focuses on Donald Trump's physical health, specifically warning against strokes and commanding blood clots in his calves, thighs, and brain to dissolve. He mentions Trump's marriage to Melania and prays for the protection of his family members, including Barron, Eric, Don Jr., Tiffany, and Ivanka. Brandon claims that Eric and Don Jr. are making major financial and cryptocurrency decisions, advising them to exercise severe discernment regarding their business partners to secure generational wealth.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND ENEMY PLANS: Brandon describes a vision of the devil and six demons in a war room plotting to destroy America. He states that these plans will backfire due to confusion within the enemy's camp, as God already knows the outcome. He also mentions individuals referred to as the George, stating they will be brought to justice and replaced by even darker figures, while emphasizing that believers must continuously use their spiritual authority.
rawData: [October 28, 2025]-[We have a lot to pray about]-[https://youtu.be/QUSXR54lEmI]-[Well, good morning, family, good evening wherever you are. I talk to people all over the world, so I always say morning. Thank you for joining us again tonight. We have some work to do. I don't even really know where to start other than I just want to give God all the praise and glory for what he's doing. As we see, prayer changes things. We see Pam Bondi and the man saying that he wanted to harm her, trying to pay $45,000, which was around—I saw 50 on the wanted. As I have been praying over this today, I have more to share with you. The Lord is revealing more to us, Diana and I, and my children. As we were driving around, I saw a football, and Pam Bondi was holding a football, but I didn't understand what I was seeing on the 19th. When I saw her holding the football, I said, 'This looks like a football, but it has layers.' It transformed from a football to a pinwheel that had layers that looked dark black and white. That's why I said it looked like one of those Hostess cupcakes. It had the frosting all in it, and it was pinwheel-looking, and the football turned into that. The Lord said there are many layers to this for her to expose. She's going to expose this darkness, but she needs a little bit more information to nail the coffin closed and make it a closed case. She has enough evidence that she's going to run with this. The Lord said because of what she will expose, there will be a price on her head. I saw a price tag of over $50,000. I saw the zeros, and I saw not 45, but 50. As I saw this red list, I saw Alex Jones was going to expose some things that were dark, and what he would say would be credible. I saw Tucker Carlson on the list. I saw many judges on this hit list and people in high authority—Giuliani. I saw many people on this list, and some of their names had more zeros than others. The Lord said, 'You must pray for their protection, for they are on a list to be taken out, and you must intercede for them, for this is bigger than you realize.' I saw foreign people—and I can't go into all that—who were funding this through crypto. That's all I'm going to say. We're going to continue to pray for them because the Lord said what was said today was communication. It's bigger than the man that was caught today; this is communication. Why would they have this gambling ring? And why would some of these people who are worth millions participate in this? They're already worth millions of dollars. Why would they risk their chance of going to prison for a couple million dollars for these big people? You are thinking too small. That's what the Lord said. Blackmail. Blackmail tapes, videotapes. The Lord said videotapes with them doing certain things with certain young people. Blackmail. 'Do what we tell you to do or more will come out.' This is deeper than what you can ever understand. And the Lord said—and that's all I will say about that—but you must know that it doesn't make sense. You can play the video of what the Lord said. Yes, sir. Go ahead, son. Just play it right there and show them what the Lord said. Football, baseball... oh, and sports people. And then he talked to us about LeBron James, and I thought that was interesting. He said he'll retire soon. Everybody says, 'Well, of course he will.' No, I'm talking about something more to this. I saw the king be dethroned—the name King James. There's more to this, and it was not a good thing. The Lord said he would be dethroned. A humbling is coming. I don't know what that means, but I saw a humbling coming, a play on words. I'm just telling you what I saw. There's something more to a dethroning of a king who considers himself way above the King of Kings, the Lord of Lords, Jesus Christ. King James Version, King—all this stuff was in the air. But the Lord said, 'There's about to be something huge happen in the NBA. There's about to be something huge happen in the NFL and the major league.' He said, 'Watch what I'm about to do in these areas.' So, that's what we were praying over. You see, it's bigger than you realize. The Lord said this several weeks ago. He said, 'Pray for an exposing of dark things: NFL, Major League Baseball, and the NBA.' It will be in all these arenas. I saw major corruption. The Lord said it will be an uncovering. And that's what this pinwheel is. And I'm telling you, she had a football. I said, 'What is this?' because we're not even talking about football; we're talking about basketball and some of this stuff. But the Lord said there's deep dark corruption. And if you go back to what I saw concerning the children, consider the children trafficking. It's much deeper than most of you will ever realize. But as this happens, if we pray into this, the Lord said he has a hand on it. I'm telling you, we will see revival break out in major sporting events. I saw major key players having a major revival and the Holy Ghost taking over the NFL, NBA, and Major League Baseball. We're going to see people that are going to get really radical for Jesus in the days ahead, a major revival they will be used to bring forth. The Lord is going to pour out his spirit on our sports. People will idolize them like gods, like Michael Jordans and all the celebrities. The Lord said he's going to use that celebrity for his glory for bringing in the harvest. Watch what he does with these young people. But even more so with the music industry—the Lord said pray over the music industry. Pray over all this for there's an uncovering. Even when I told you I saw a new Democratic woman being groomed by the devil, hand-selected by the devil, I saw this woman being raised up and appointed. Even when I told you yesterday I saw this new pastor coming to Australia—I keep seeing these key figures. The Lord's hand-selecting people, and the devil's trying to hand-select people. It's interesting to me because I keep seeing both sides. The Lord's showing me the devil picking people to try to cause great distraction and disruption in the move. And then you see God saying, 'I'm raising up these people. I'm going to raise up new men with great voices like David's, Hannah's, and Esther's, and they're going to be prayer people. They're going to be the closers.' The Lord keeps talking about all this, but then I keep seeing the enemy and he has his plan. But we know who has the greater plan. Greater is he that is in us than he that is in the world. The Lord told us, 'You're about to see weather manipulation, weaponized weather more than what you've ever seen before.' He said that even last night with ice storms, winter cyclones, heavy snowfall, blizzard conditions in Buffalo, and lake effect snow that will be the largest we've ever seen. I'm talking about seeing major weather events in the days ahead. Well, you say, 'Well, Brandon, we have weather events all the time.' Yes, but this is going to be different from what I saw. I saw major winds, major straight-line winds, and power outages that would go for a thousand miles. I'm talking about crippling ice storms. The Lord said, 'You have to pray over the weather.' That's why I brought all that up last night. I was trying to encourage you to use your authority over drought and rain. As he is, so are we in this world. The Lord was showing us: 'Brandon, if I can call peace to the storms, I've given you the ability to pray over it also.' As he is, so are we in this world. I just wanted to encourage you all when I showed you how much rain northern Oklahoma got, all over Tulsa. Every time I call in a certain number, I say I'm waiting for over five inches of rain to come over our land, fill our rivers, our ponds, our creeks, and our lakes so that we don't have a drought. We take authority over drought. We call the rain in Jesus' name. You have authority to do that. Pray over your weather. There it is, right there. Everywhere in Tulsa, the rain came. That's what the Lord was trying to show you. You can do that to your town. You can call in the rain. That's why I was praying over Australia, because I saw a great drought and that even the kangaroos would die because there's no water. I saw the lakes and the ponds completely dry with big cracks, and the land was like tumbleweeds blowing across. It was so bad. The Lord said, 'Pray for the rain. Pray for the rain.' That's what I was trying to show you. We started calling it in because we hadn't had rain in September, October, or November. Hey sweetie, you want to come sit by me? I'll get out and then you can come sit down. I have my buddy. Sorry, I didn't want to disturb you. You're good. Come sit down by me. You look so marvelous. So, we're just talking about all the rain and everything. We were praying over the rain, believing God for supernatural rain. If you ever read anything, you hold it out of your mouth, don't you? Well, you can read about the blood. I have the book. We read that book last night. When you started reading, I felt the presence of the Lord. Did you? I don't know if they did, but I did. That's all that matters. But I'm reading about the precious blood of Jesus. You know, these little pocketbooks you can get for a buck. I love reading stuff like that, filling yourself up and being controlled by the Holy Ghost. We were listening to Corrie ten Boom today, and it was wonderful. It was on YouTube and it blessed me. It made me really go deep inside of myself to say, 'Listen, you've got to come up higher.' Beautiful. She challenged me, this lady did. We didn't even finish it, but I just want to encourage everyone to find things that will inspire you. Find things that will fan your flame to keep that fire going. Don't wait on your pastor or whoever is over you that you listen to. Don't wait on them to feed you Wednesdays and Sundays or whenever you go to church. You've got to have that bulldog-on-a-bone faith to say, 'Hey, I'm going to feed myself. I've got to get out there and get a hold of something. I cannot wait for somebody to spoon-feed me. I've got to have enough to be a scavenger. I'm going to find something and live by faith, and I don't need somebody else to feed me. I'm going to feed myself.' That's what Diana and I have always done. When Megan was first diagnosed with autism, we couldn't really go to church because it was such a distraction. For all those years, we just learned how to feed ourselves. We fought. I said we're going to keep going with this and we're going to find the word for whatever we need. A lot of times, it was always Kenneth E. Hagin. I listen to Brother Hagin most of all, and then to the people we listen to now. Just keep fanning that flame. Listen to Lynn Hammond. Stir up how to pray in the spirit. How bad do you want change in your life? How hungry and desperate are you for change? Are you willing to go out and look for something versus sitting there waiting? I'm telling you, it comes to the point where I see a lot of these people say, 'Brandon, I need all this.' Get it. Be a contender. Fight for it. Nobody's going to just give it to you. You have to want it bad enough. I want change. I want the Holy Ghost in my life. I want the glory and the presence. I want Jesus manifested in my home so that whenever I have an issue, when you're overcoming something, when you get a bad report, or when you have a bill you can't pay and the creditors are calling, you know what to do. If you have a need, you sow a seed. That's what we learned. He said he gives you wisdom to get wealth. So, we believe God and he gives us wisdom to make money. But what happens if you need a doctor's report? You find scripture. That's what we always do. We go back to the word. Find scriptures that pertain to what you're believing for and quote those scriptures over your life. We have Bibles everywhere. Diana got a waterproof Bible. I thought that was perfect for the end times. You could hide it in the woods. The Antichrist is going to take everybody's Bible away. I don't even think that would burn. I just know we're in a time like we've never seen before, and it's going to keep increasing. As of the 23rd, I know there is an acceleration, and we're about to see things we've never seen before. I have an urgency to come on here all the time to pray and to tell you all that Jesus Christ is coming and you've got to get your house in order. People ask, 'What does that mean, Brandon?' Well, what does that feel like to you? What is the Lord telling you to do? Do you have an urgency in your spirit to draw close to him? Does he know you? If you were to have a face-to-face encounter with the Lord, would he say, 'I know them'? Or would he say, "You know, you may know a lot about the Father, but does he know you? Do you just go and visit once a month or once a year at church, or do you have a relationship every single day with him?" If I only had a relationship with Diana every month or every year, there wouldn't be a good marriage. A marriage is based on having a relationship every single day. We talk, we have communion. That's what I'm trying to tell you. That's the way it is with the Father. You must have a relationship with him and find things that will inspire you to keep going: books, tape series, whatever. Back in the day, I used to buy a tape series every single time I got paid. I'd find a tape series and I'd listen to that one tape series the whole time because we only got paid every two weeks. I said if I could listen to it every time, whether it would be usually Lester Sumrall or somebody like that, I'd find something and think, "Man, I want to listen to these old-timers." I would listen to that whole tape series for two weeks and then I'd alternate them out just continually. Faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of God. The only way you're going to get strong is with your faith growing. But faith works by love, so you've got to keep strife out. I'm telling you, it's like seeing an engine where the pistons and all the parts are moving in the engine so that you go really fast. But if one thing is off, that engine is not going to work right. That's the way it is in the spirit realm. You've got to make sure all those pistons are firing and all that stuff in the spirit is firing and going perfectly so that you're going forward in your spiritual walk. That's going to make that spiritual car go forward. If not, you're going to be idle and sitting by, asking, "Why am I still this way after all these years? How come nothing's changed?" Most people keep doing the same thing expecting different results, and that's the definition of insanity. That's why I say if it isn't working after 30 days, or if it isn't working after 60 days, we've got to make some changes in here. If what you're doing isn't getting you closer to God after a couple of weeks and you're saying, "Well, I'm still idly sitting by," the Bible says if we draw nigh to him, he'll draw nigh to us. So I'm just looking, "Father, I want more. I'm desperate, I'm hungry, I'm thirsty." For you said those that hunger and thirst after righteousness shall be filled. I believe with all my heart that my wife and I are hungry, thirsty, and desperate. For the eyes of the Lord are running to and fro throughout the whole earth, looking for a heart who's perfect towards him. If the eyes of the Lord are running to and fro throughout the whole earth, looking for a heart who's perfect towards him, let his eyes rest on me. Help me, O Lord, to have a perfect heart. Create in me a clean heart, Lord, so that you can look at me and say, "Hey, I want to go and visit his house." I make him feel comfortable in my home. I create an atmosphere of worship in the house. I usually have worship playing all the time on the TV. I said, "Man, if Jesus showed up right now, would he be happy to be here?" Or would he go, "You know what? I look at the time, I need to keep walking down the road here." Or would he go, "Hey, you know what? I'd like to take my sandals off here and sit down and visit. Can we just have a little bit of tea? Let's have that iced tea, son. I'd like to sit down and talk. Just have a little talk with Jesus." So, I just try to inspire you all to get close to him before we get into the real serious stuff with Pam Bondi and all the things that the Lord has shown us. It all comes out of relationship. I'm going to be real with y'all: I have issues, Diana has issues, Braden has—we all have issues. But we diligently seek him. We want him more than we want air. I want him more than I want water. I'm a big guy and I'm overweight, and I want him more than I want food. How much more do you want the Father in your life and change? I don't want to live tomorrow the same way I did today. I don't want to be this way this time next year. Smith Wigglesworth said, "If you don't see change in your life spiritually every three days, you're backsliding." That challenged me. I thought, "Backsliding? Wow." Because we're supposed to be going from glory to glory. He's changing us into his likeness and image to perfect in me the love of God shown to the world. I know there's more, even with all the things that the Lord has graciously shown me. For whatever reason he chooses to show me anything, I know there's more. When you see beyond the veil, you know there's much more. If I could just camp there. There are rooms in the spirit, places in the spirit where you can go. I can go to certain rooms in the spirit, and you know when you visit there that the room is vast, but there are levels of glory and levels of relationship. So many people are like the chickens pecking around, but you were created for so much more. He made you to be an eagle to soar, and you can go anywhere you want while praying in the spirit. But if you choose to be a chicken, you only stay in that barnyard. God's called you to come up higher, like the eagles, and soar with him in the high places. There's so much more. When I was my son's age, I would fast and pray every other day because I just wanted to see the dead raised. I still do. I wanted to see the blinded eyes open. I want to hear the Father. I want to have a relationship with him. I don't like religion. And I know that there's a place in God where you experience that glory that Satan dare not go. He's scared spitless when you come up in there. Even when we can see when people have demonic spirits and we've got the glory and we feel it—we feel that 'oozing' as I call it, that overflow coming out of you—they start to manifest when they get around you. I'm telling you, the devil is scared spitless of the anointing and the presence of God and a Christian that understands and knows who they are. He's scared spitless of them, but he's not scared of the ones that don't know who they are. I said, "You can quote Bible, you can quote books, and it would be like saying, 'Twinkle, Twinkle, Little Star' if you don't realize who you are." He knows the difference between one who knows it and one who doesn't. There is a level of authority that the devil is scared of. It's like having a police officer dressed in uniform. It's the authority of the government that backs him when he says, "Stop." His outfit doesn't really make anyone stop; it's what the outfit represents. The moment he puts his hand up like that, that's all he has to do to a big old semitruck. Stop. And that semi will stop. Why? Because of what is backing that badge. What's backing him? Not just a gun on his hip or handcuffs, but the law of the land, the government, and what we set in motion as the United States of America backs him. And he knows all he has to do is just put his hand up. As a believer, everything that the Lord has given you, he is backing you. And you put that hand up. You say, "No, devil. You ain't robbing me of my stuff. You're not going to take my children. You're not going to take my marriage. You're not going to take my finances. No, devil." Why? Why does he have to back you? Because he knows when you know. He knows when you know who you are because you have that badge on. There's a spiritual authority when he knows you know. There's a confidence, there's a swag to it: "Stop, devil!" versus somebody who doesn't. Now, if you get out there and you see a cop, and he's all scared, "Stop, semi! Bear down, semi!" you would go over there and run him over. If I stood out there, that semi is going to run me over because I don't have the badge on. That's what the devil does. And I'm trying to help you. When you get a revelation of who you are and you start speaking—and you're a speaking spirit—you decree a thing and you start saying what the word says. It's the word that backs you. You can pray all day long and you can say certain things, but if you don't realize it's not down inside you, when it becomes rhema to you, when it becomes a rhema word, when it becomes a rhema word inside of your spirit, you say, "God is before me, who can be against me? No weapon formed against me is going to prosper." People say all the time, "Brandon, you are crazy. I can't believe all the things you say on the internet." When God is for me, there are more with me than there are with them. I'm not going to tell you I'm not nervous sometimes, but there are more with me than there are with them. And if I go home, I've already seen so much of heaven. To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord. Do you understand? When you've seen glimpses of the things I've seen, I say, "My goodness, folks, it's glorious." Heaven is a place. Heaven is a place, and it's my home. I'm just visiting here. And I just want you to know that heaven can be your home. Heaven can be a place that you're going to call home. He has a mansion ready for me. He has a mansion that's ready for you. If you confess him and you invite Jesus Christ to be your Lord and Savior, he's no respecter of persons, and what he'll do for one, he'll do for another. But he is a respecter of faith, and he looks at those who diligently believe him, who diligently ask, seek, and knock. How bad, how desperate do you want change in your life? There are so many people that just think, "Well, you know what? I resisted the devil one time and I said it a couple of times and it didn't work." Well, you're the Rock of Gibraltar. You need to understand—it's that bulldog spirit when he comes and starts knocking on your door. I put that blood on the door. We've got the anointing oil. I've got my box right here; you put it over here for me. My friend Billy Burke gave me this for Christmas. Paisley has my other one. She told me, "Daddy, I need my own anointing oil. I want to anoint stuff, too." And I said, "Okay." So I gave her the oil and she takes it and she anoints things. She carries it with her. She believes because I teach her and I train her. You understand? And this represents something. I believe in calling for the elders of the church, and when they anoint you with oil, the prayer of faith will heal the sick. I believe in the power of the covenant. And so you're going to have to learn that in these last days or you're not going to make it. You have to understand who you are. Psalm 23 and Psalm 91—you must read those all the time. You must read Ephesians. I've seen a great storm coming. I've talked about this many times. I want my son to play what I see coming in another video for you. When was this? April 7th, 2024. I had this vision and I want you to hear this because the Lord said, "Pray over this today. This is where we are right now: April the 7th of 2024." Now, play it. We saw people with signs that said, "We want our entitlements." Their welfare, their food stamps—all of that was cut off. All of the government-funded welfare programs were gone. And I saw lines of people 10,000 deep having a march, like those marches for abortion or the Martin Luther King march—all those kinds of marches. Does that make sense? Like civil rights protests. They were like protests, but it was like they were marching for a cause. They were all upset. There were literally thousands of people, and they all had signs and they were furious at the government for cutting off welfare programs. They were rioting and they were pillaging stores. They were tearing up all of the downtown areas, major shopping areas, and malls—just destroying them, breaking all the glass, running in and grabbing anything they wanted. But there were so many people you couldn't stop them all. It was bad. They were looting and setting things on fire. It was similar to what happened with all the riots during COVID from that man who got suffocated—that terrible thing that happened. It was similar to that, but it was worse. It was everywhere. Not just a couple of cities; it was really bad. When I was in the spirit, I could see this while I was praying. Then I could see martial law. I saw army people everywhere—Marines. They had army helmets on. I saw full fatigue. They were going through the streets with Hummers and army vehicles. I saw barbed wire fence being blocked off in certain blocks where you couldn't go anywhere, with military brigades and blockages in major cities. I saw Philadelphia and Chicago; this was happening up in New York. I saw families getting in cars, fleeing the cities, trying to get south, trying to get away from what was happening. I saw a complete meltdown of the financial structure in America, worse than anybody can comprehend. The major cities were in anarchy. It was crazy the way everybody was acting. I saw the army and all of the military coming in and taking over these major cities, making it a lockdown where you could not get out of your house because of the rioting and the protesting. I saw people fleeing to come to the South. I saw gardens because there was no food—not much food in the stores—and people were growing their own gardens with seeds like squash, potatoes, and tomatoes. Whatever they could do to have a garden, they had big fences around them trying to produce food for families to be able to sustain life. People were trying to go to rural areas, trying to get away into areas where there weren't a lot of people moving and relocating. Oklahoma and Kansas—I'm telling you, it was full of people trying to move and find places. I saw the rich people trying to pawn off Rolex watches. I saw the Rolexes, diamond rings, and gold bracelets. I saw fancy luxury cars. If you want to watch the rest of it, you can. I'm not going to play the whole video, but I see our government, the Democratic party, and the Republicans. Well, if we're not going to have those food stamps by the first, which is Saturday... and I'm not saying that this is the event. I know it's coming, but could we delay it? I believe the power of prayer can do anything, as we've seen. I don't play this to scare you; I play this to prepare you so that we know what the Holy Spirit has warned us about—what the enemy is going to try to do to bring civil unrest to America and bring in martial law in these major cities. If this happens, Trump won't have much of a choice if they don't agree to give people their handouts. I'm not here to be political; I'm trying to tell you we need to pray because if we can pray to avert this, I believe we can stop it. It's very important that we raise up our voices right now, pray in the spirit, and believe God for a supernatural, divine reversal—a turnaround for what the devil has meant for bad. God will turn it around. I feel this is on purpose. Do you understand what I'm trying to tell you all? They want him to look like a fool—Trump. They want to derail America. Why? Because if America is out of the way, then they can bring in the digital system. They can bring in the beast system. America is the last domino to fall before we see a major beast system, a one-world order. All these things take place. And if Kamala Harris would have been here—I had to be political on that—I'm telling you, we'd already be on that road. But I saw Trump being a log in the road to the plan of the elite for a global takeover. The dollar's in the way. But he was in a canoe and he was paddling as hard as he could on Niagara Falls, and he was right at the edge of the waterfall. And the Lord said, 'Pray for him. He needs strength.' He was paddling as hard as he could, trying to keep the boat America, the ship USA, from going over the water's edge. But the Lord said he can delay it, but he will not stop it altogether. He's just buying you time. He was sweating profusely trying to keep the boat from going over the edge—America, the economy, everything. Folks, look around you. Here we have the government shutdown for five weeks now. And they're saying, 'Well, we don't have enough to pay our military.' So, a billionaire had to give one hundred and something million dollars to pay all the military. They don't care about the military who's risking their life to protect us, or the FAA—that's your flights, watching over you in the skies. People are calling in sick. They don't even come to work because they aren't getting paid. So, is it real safe to get in a plane right now? I don't know; I'm just saying you need to think about stuff.
